author: jujujuda
title: Silent Fallback Behavior Masks Runtime Failures
notes: Claims contain factual errors: load_state() never returns None (returns empty_state()), and is not silent (5+ logger.warning calls, 3 stderr prints). config.py DOES distinguish file-not-found from corruption (different code paths). _dimension_weight returning 1.0 is a reasonable defensive default for circular-import handling. Overall a generic code-style observation about fallback patterns with multiple inaccuracies.
